fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: glamsterdam-devnet-5 at 95% participation; Prysm and Nimbus nodes still offline
glamsterdam-devnet-6 targeting mid-next-week; Alpha 11 CL specs + EL tests due Monday; missing stable container/SSZ EIP on CL side
EIP-7904 (compute repricing) converted to informational EIP; all clients exceed 100M gas/sec; no repricings needed for Glamsterdam

eip_proposals_hegota.highlight: EIP-8304 (Trustless Log/Tx Index): sorted SSZ tables per block in system contract; <2% block processing overhead; proof generation ~17ms avg; PFI'd
EIP-7645 (alias ORIGIN to SENDER): removes pre-AA tech debt; ORIGIN use being exploited in the wild; CFI'd to Hegota
EIP-2488 (deprecate CALLCODE opcode): presenter absent; deferred to next call for presentation

glamsterdam_spec_changes.highlight: EIP-8282 (validator/builder queue separation): 2 CL implementations ready; awaiting 1 EL implementation; CFI added to Glamsterdam Meta EIP
EIP-8189 (Snap2 networking): Geth, Besu, ethrex progressing; proposed for inclusion in Glamsterdam or Hegota Meta EIP

EIP-7928 (BAL state access restructuring): soft-committed to Tony's proposal; Dragon's alternative (move balance+call-stack check before loading target) also under consideration; decision async by end of week
EIP-7937 state gas refund flow updated: refunds now return to gas-left first, then reservoir; Create charging now unconditional with end-of-execution refill; merging today for devnet-6

action_items.action: Review Dragan's three-option summary for EIP-7928 BAL state access ordering; respond async by end of day (EU teams by tomorrow morning)
Merge EIP-8282 into Glamsterdam Meta EIP (8081) following no objections on call

decisions.decision: EIP-8282 added as CFI to Glamsterdam; no objections raised on call
EIP-7928 soft-committed using Tony's proposal as default; teams to review Dragon's alternative async; final decision by end of week to meet devnet-6 Monday test deadline
EIP-7937 state gas refund and Create charging changes merged; spec for devnet-6
EIP-7645 (alias ORIGIN to SENDER) CFI'd to Hegota; EIP-8304 (Trustless Log Index) PFI'd to Hegota

targets.target: glamsterdam-devnet-6 launch — mid-week, week of June 23, 2026
Alpha 11 CL specs + EL tests — Monday, June 23, 2026
All devnet-6 PRs merged + CL Alpha 11 release — Friday/Monday for Wednesday devnet-6 launch
